title: Prediabetes follow-up

investigations.text: Supports clinician-reviewed A1C, glucose or other glycaemic monitoring and individualized follow-up frequency without generating a target or diagnosis.
investigations.rationale: The exact monitoring section supports interval change, clinician-reviewed glycaemic laboratory results and arranged follow-up without diagnosing diabetes or applying a numeric interval.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed A1C, glucose or other glycaemic monitoring and individualized follow-up frequency without generating a target or diagnosis.

source.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting weight and cardiometabolic risk context, patient goals, discussed prevention-program context and clinician-entered follow-up; no advice is auto-generated.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact risk and goals section supports functional context, patient goals, measured weight, clinician-entered plan and questions without auto-generating diet or activity advice.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting weight and cardiometabolic risk context, patient goals, discussed prevention-program context and clinician-entered follow-up; no advice is auto-generated.

source.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 3.3–3.7 — person-centred risk and prevention discussion

sources_used.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
sources_used.jurisdiction: United States professional standard; international evidence requiring UAE adaptation

source_limitations: Diagnostic test and value, trend, weight, risk factors, pregnancy, medicines, lifestyle, cardiovascular risk, interpretation and management remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
